div.class: d-flex flex-wrap align-items-start justify-content-between gap-3 mb-3 itc-page-header

div.p: Browse upcoming events and the full portfolio of courses.

t.div: No courses found for the selected filters.
Contact us for inhouse options or to register your interest in an upcoming date

div.span: View our Training Terms and Conditions

div.p: This course is not currently scheduled.
Enquire about in-house training or register your interest in an upcoming mixed-client class.
As required by the Engagement Institute, licensed programs are only visible to logged-in users.
Sign in to view dates and book.

xpath.attribute: opt_event_registration_block and not (event.show_in_portfolio and (event.schedule_state != 'scheduled' or request.env.user._is_public()))
(opt_event_dates_block or opt_event_calendar_block) and not (event.show_in_portfolio and (event.schedule_state != 'scheduled' or request.env.user._is_public()))
opt_event_registration_block and not (event.show_in_portfolio and (event.schedule_state != 'scheduled' or request.env.user._is_public()))
opt_event_location_block and event.address_id and not (event.show_in_portfolio and request.env.user._is_public())
opt_event_organizer_block and event.organizer_id and not (event.show_in_portfolio and request.env.user._is_public())
